title: The Duchess of Plakendia
actors: Rita Myrat, Alekos Deligiannis, Voula Harilaou
plot: After leaving Nafplio, the first capital of the newly founded Greek Nation, the affluent French Duchess of Plaisance and ardent philhellene, Sophie de Marbois-Lebrun, moves to Athens with her young daughter, Eliza, circa 1834.
